scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/frontend build && bun run --cwd apps/api build && bun run --cwd apps/worker build
scripts.deploy: bun run shopify:config && shopify app deploy --config generated --allow-updates
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/frontend typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/worker typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/pos-domain typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/runtime-config typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shopify-auth typecheck
